slides.title: A little morning sun *goes a long way*.
slides.sub: Vitamin D quietly supports your bones, immune system and how well you age. Most people run lower than they think.

slides.title: What vitamin D supports
slides.body: It helps your body absorb calcium and *may support* immune health. Strong bones rely on it for decades.

slides.title: Many people run low
slides.body: Indoor days, sunscreen and northern winters all lower it. Low levels are *linked to* weaker bones and immunity.

slides.title: Sensible sun helps
slides.body: A short stretch of midday light on bare skin *can help* your body make its own. Never burn.

slides.title: Food and supplements
slides.body: Fatty fish, eggs and fortified foods add some. A simple supplement *may help* fill the gap in winter.

slides.title: Check your level
slides.body: A quick blood test shows where you stand. Knowing your number *takes the guesswork* out of it.

slides.title: Build habits that *hold up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the sunlight, food and movement behind aging well, all in one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
A little morning sun does more for your long game than you might guess. 🌿

Vitamin D supports your bones and immune system, yet most people run low. Sensible sun, the right foods and a quick test keep you on track. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those daily habits into one simple score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How Morning Sunlight and Vitamin D Help You Age Well
